commands.repair_reason: The next action is maintainer product/security approval plus current-head proof and green checks; there is no narrow automated repair target from the reviewed diff.; Needs attention: The diff introduces an opt-in trusted cross-session context-injection surface that needs explicit maintainer product/security approval before merge. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds disabled-by-default agent continuation tools and runtime support for `continue_work`, `continue_delegate`, and `request_compaction`, including queue-backed delegate return delivery, cross-session targeting controls, compaction lifecycle hooks, trace propagation, status/docs, and tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a new feature PR rather than a report of broken current-main behavior. The relevant verification path is live current-head execution of the new continuation tools and delivery modes.
commands.review_followup: The next action is maintainer product/security approval plus current-head proof and green checks; there is no narrow automated repair target from the reviewed diff.
